full_text:
Sun Gan 孫幹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Gan (孫幹). Got high rank thanks to his older brother Sun Chen. Sun Gan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Gan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
